name: eval datasets: P-2 bootstrap script reads O-1 seed/agent-datasets/<agent>.jsonl and copies into evals/datasets/agents/<agent>.jsonl
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/p2-bootstrap-from-seed.sh" --agent review-types && [ -s evals/datasets/agents/review-types.jsonl ] && echo ok 1>&2
